_comment: Copy this to ~/.config/claude-code-freeagent/config.json and edit. Nothing secret goes here — the actual OAuth tokens live in the two credential files named below. See docs/SETUP.md.
_downloads_comment: Where you tend to save invoice PDFs. Point this wherever yours land.
_cc_marker_comment: Appended to every description Claude touches, so you (and your accountant) can filter for them. Use anything distinctive.
_cutoffs_comment: Optional. Keyed by the bank-account NAME exactly as it appears in FreeAgent. Anything on that account dated before the cutoff is ignored — useful for a personal account linked mid-year that dragged in pre-business history. Leave as {} if you have none.
_chrome_comment: Optional. Only needed for email-body receipts (e.g. Trainline) rendered to PDF. Auto-detected on macOS/Linux; set explicitly if yours lives elsewhere.
